title: Smoked Casabe Fritters
description: A sweet and crispy fritter made with casabe, perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine casabe, gratin, cozy, smoky, and sugar.
In a separate bowl, beat the eggs and mix with milk.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until well combined.
Using a cookie scoop, drop the mixture into a greased skillet.
Heat the skillet over medium heat until the fritters are golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Flip the fritters and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Transfer the fritters to the preheated oven and bake for 10-12 minutes or until crispy.
